# Walytics
> Real-time analytics dashboard for Walrus decentralized storage on Sui blockchain

## About
Walytics Holmes is an analytics dashboard built for the Walrus decentralized storage protocol on the Sui blockchain. It gives developers, researchers, and builders a real-time window into blob storage activity — tracking uploads, publishers, storage epochs, and network health across the Walrus ecosystem.

The project was built for the Walrus hackathon and features a detective noir aesthetic themed around the character "Walytics Holmes," who guides users through on-chain analytics with personality. The name plays on "The game is afoot" from Sherlock Holmes — here, the game is a blob.

Key features include:
- Live KPI dashboard showing total blobs, storage volume, active publishers, and epoch data
- Blob timeline charts visualizing storage activity over time
- Publisher leaderboards ranking the most active storage nodes
- Blob Explorer for drilling into individual blob metadata and details
- AI-powered analytics chat with Walytics Holmes using Gemini AI
- Getting started tutorial for new Walrus users
- Technical documentation and API reference

## Pages
- / — Dashboard with KPIs, blob timeline, publisher rankings, and real-time Walrus network stats
- /explorer — Browse and analyze individual blobs stored on the Walrus network
- /chat — AI-powered analytics chat with Walytics Holmes character, powered by Gemini AI
- /tutorial — Getting started guide for using Walytics and the Walrus protocol
- /docs — Technical documentation and API reference for the Walytics platform

## Tech
- Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript
- Tatum Sui RPC for Sui blockchain data
- Walrus Protocol for decentralized blob storage data
- Gemini AI for the conversational analytics assistant
- Custom CSS (detective noir brutalist theme, no Tailwind)

## Context
Walytics was built as a hackathon project to provide visibility into the Walrus decentralized storage network. Walrus is a protocol on Sui that enables cost-efficient, resilient blob storage for Web3 applications. Walytics surfaces on-chain analytics in a way that is accessible and visually engaging.

## Links
- Production: https://walytics.vercel.app
- Sitemap: https://walytics.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
